response.original_title: How to Buy XRP with Uphold (Step-by-Step Guide)
response.overview: To buy XRP on Uphold, first create or log in to your Uphold account ☎️ 〔+1 (833)〔644〕(5290) and complete the identity verification (OTX) ☎️ 〔+1 (833)〔644〕(5290) if you haven’t already. Then add funds to your account using a bank transfer, debit card, ☎️ 〔+1 (833)〔644〕(5290) or another supported payment method. Once your balance is available, go to the “Transact” section, ☎️ 〔+1 (833)〔644〕(5290) (US/OTA) choose the currency you want to use, and select XRP as the asset you want to receive. Enter the amount, ☎️ 〔+1 (833)〔644〕(5290)  review the transaction details, and confirm the purchase.
response.title: How to Buy XRP with Uphold (Step-by-Step Guide)
